text: switch back to gpt-oss-120b model, as it's good with finance
description:
Switch mobile voice interface back to gpt-oss-120b model (noted as good with finance).

**Part of:** Native Android voice interface (aim 93149e0b)

**Blocked by:** Parent aim requires human decisions on mobile app strategy, tech stack, and LLM model choice.

**Context:** This is a model selection preference for the mobile app. The broader mobile strategy needs to be decided first.

status.comment: Blocked by parent mobile app strategy - see aim 93149e0b
